feat.name: Fey
feat.text: Your creature type is fey, rather than humanoid. You are immune to spells that only affect humanoids (Hold Person, Charm Person, Dominate Person, etc.).

feat.name: Magic Resistance
feat.text: You have advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

feat.name: Mirthful Leaps
feat.text: Whenever you make a long or high jump, you can roll a d8 and add the number rolled to the number of feet you cover, even when making a standing jump.

feat.name: Ram
feat.text: You can use your head and horns to make unarmed strikes. When you hit, you deal 1d4 + STR bludgeoning damage.

feat.name: Languages
feat.text: You can speak, read, and write Common and Sylvan.

class.name: Bard (College of Eloquence)
class.weapons: Simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords
class.tools: Three musical instruments of your choice

feat.name: Bardic Inspiration (d20)
feat.text: You can inspire others through stirring words or music. Bonus action, choose one creature within 60 feet who can hear you. That creature gains one Bardic Inspiration die (d20 with Soulstring Banjo). You can use this feature 5 times per short rest (CHA modifier).

feat.name: UNSETTLING WORDS
feat.text: BONUS ACTION. Spend 1 Bardic Inspiration. Target within 60ft subtracts your Inspiration die (d20) from their NEXT SAVING THROW before your next turn. USE BEFORE HOLD MONSTER.

feat.name: Silver Tongue
feat.text: When you make a Persuasion or Deception check, treat any roll of 9 or lower as a 10. Your minimum result is 27.

feat.name: Unfailing Inspiration
feat.text: When an ally uses your Bardic Inspiration die and still fails the ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, they keep the Inspiration die.

feat.name: Universal Speech
feat.text: Action. Choose up to 5 creatures within 60 feet. For 1 hour, they magically understand you regardless of language. 1/long rest or expend a spell slot.

feat.name: Infectious Inspiration
feat.text: Reaction. When a creature within 60 feet uses your Bardic Inspiration and succeeds, you can give another creature within 60 feet a Bardic Inspiration die without expending a use. 5 times per long rest.

feat.name: Jack of All Trades
feat.text: Add +3 (half proficiency) to any ability check that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus. Includes initiative and Counterspell checks.

feat.name: Song of Rest (d12)
feat.text: During a short rest, if you or allies spend Hit Dice to regain HP, each regains an extra 1d12 HP.

feat.name: Expertise
feat.text: Double proficiency bonus for: Persuasion, Deception, Performance, Perception.

feat.name: Countercharm
feat.text: Action. For 1 minute, you and friendly creatures within 30 feet have advantage on saving throws against being frightened or charmed.

feat.name: Magical Secrets (L10)
feat.text: Counterspell, Find Greater Steed

feat.name: Magical Secrets (L14)
feat.text: Haste, Aura of Vitality

feat.name: Soulstring Banjo (Artifact)
feat.text: TWO SOULS, ONE SONG: Bardic Inspiration = d20. CRESCENDO OF SOULS (1/day): Action. 60ft radius. 8d8 thunder. DC 19 CON or STUNNED 1 round. SOUL RESONANCE (1/day): If incapacitated, Fifth acts for 1 minute. HARMONIC SHIELD: Advantage vs charm, fear, psychic. DAILY SPELLS (2/day each): Fly, Invisibility, Levitate, Protection from Energy, Cure Wounds 3rd (3d8+5), Dispel Magic.

feat.name: Resonance Key
feat.text: AMPLIFIED INSPIRATION (1/day): Next Inspiration = d20+10. AMPLIFIED CRESCENDO (1/day): 120ft, 12d8 thunder, stun 2 rounds. SOUL SPEECH: Fifth speaks words.

spell.name: Vicious Mockery
spell.text: WIS save or 4d4 psychic damage and disadvantage on next attack roll. SAFE CONCENTRATION ACTION.

spell.name: Minor Illusion
spell.text: Create a sound or image of an object (max 5ft cube). Investigation check to see through.

spell.name: Mage Hand
spell.text: Spectral hand manipulates objects up to 10 lb.

spell.name: Prestidigitation
spell.text: Minor magical tricks: sensory effects, clean/soil, light/snuff, flavor, trinkets.

spell.name: Healing Word
spell.text: 1d4+5 healing. Upcast: +1d4 per level. PICK UP DOWNED ALLIES.

spell.name: Faerie Fire
spell.text: 20ft cube. DEX save or outlined. Attacks have ADVANTAGE. Negates invisibility.

spell.name: Silvery Barbs
spell.text: When creature succeeds on attack/check/save: force reroll, take lower. Give one ally advantage on next roll within 1 minute.

spell.name: Hold Person
spell.text: WIS save or PARALYZED (auto-crit in melee). Humanoids only. Repeat save end of turn.

spell.name: Suggestion
spell.text: WIS save or follow a "reasonable" suggestion. Social nuke.

spell.name: Misty Step
spell.text: Teleport 30ft to visible unoccupied space. ESCAPE BUTTON.

spell.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spell.text: 30ft cube. WIS save or CHARMED + INCAPACITATED + speed 0. Ends if damaged or shaken.

spell.name: Counterspell
spell.text: [MAGICAL SECRET] Auto-counter 3rd or lower. Higher: ability check d20+8 vs DC 10+level.

spell.name: Haste
spell.text: [MAGICAL SECRET] +2 AC, double speed, advantage DEX saves, extra Attack action. IF DROPS = TARGET LOSES TURN.

spell.name: Aura of Vitality
spell.text: [MAGICAL SECRET] Bonus action: one creature in aura regains 2d6 HP. 20d6 total over 1 min.

spell.name: Greater Invisibility
spell.text: Target invisible for duration. Doesn't end when attacking or casting.

spell.name: Dimension Door
spell.text: Teleport 500ft + one willing creature your size or smaller. EXTRACTION.

spell.name: Find Greater Steed
spell.text: [MAGICAL SECRET] Summon Pegasus (90ft fly). Telepathic bond. Self-spells affect mount. Permanent until killed.

spell.name: Hold Monster
spell.text: WIS save or PARALYZED. Works on ANY creature. Combo with Unsettling Words.

spell.name: Greater Restoration
spell.text: End: charmed, petrified, curse, ability reduction, HP max reduction.

spell.name: Mass Suggestion
spell.text: Up to 12 creatures. WIS save or follow suggestion. NO CONCENTRATION.

spell.name: Forcecage
spell.text: 10ft cage or 20ft cube. NO SAVE. Teleport out = DC 19 CHA save.

spell.name: Glibness
spell.text: Replace any CHA check roll with 15. Persuasion/Deception FLOOR 32. Magic detects you as truthful.

spell.name: Mind Blank
spell.text: IMMUNE to psychic damage, divination, charm, creature-detection. HELL ESSENTIAL.

spell.name: Foresight
spell.text: Can't be surprised. Advantage on attacks, checks, saves. Enemies have disadvantage. NO CONCENTRATION. Cast on Fighter daily.

background.name: Outlander
background.personality: Smooth-talking Southern charm. Laid-back but sharp.
background.ideals: Freedom. Music. Loyalty to those who earn it.
background.bonds: Fifth—the soul in the banjo. The party. The music itself.
background.flaws: Can't resist a stage. Sometimes too clever for his own good.

feat.name: Wanderer
feat.text: You have an excellent memory for maps and geography, and you can always recall the general layout of terrain, settlements, and other features around you. In addition, you can find food and fresh water for yourself and up to five other people each day, provided that the land offers berries, small game, water, and so forth.

feat.name: COMBAT COMBO
feat.text:
1. BA: UNSETTLING WORDS (target subtracts d20 from next save) 2. Action: HOLD MONSTER (WIS save at massive penalty) 3. Fighter auto-crits the paralyzed target
ROUND 1 DEFAULT:
- Action: Haste on Fighter - BA: Bardic Inspiration to Cleric
REACTIONS:
- Counterspell (enemy casts) - Silvery Barbs (enemy saves) - Cutting Words (enemy hits)

feat.name: DAILY ROUTINE
feat.text:
MORNING:
1. Foresight on Fighter (9th slot, 8 hours) 1. Mind Blank on self (8th slot, 24 hours)
BEFORE SOCIAL:
- Glibness (8th slot, 1 hour, floor 32)
